name: Infernux
desc: Game engine from scratch: Vulkan runtime, integrated editor, and a pass stack you can reshape—born from wanting my own renderer, taken one step further.
descZh: 从零搭建的游戏引擎：Vulkan 运行时、集成编辑器与可改写的通道栈——源于“自己的渲染器”，并再往前一步做成完整引擎。
detail: Infernux is my primary open-source game engine. Native C++17 / Vulkan owns the frame: PBR, cascaded shadows, MSAA, shader reflection, and post-processing. An integrated editor (scene/game views, hierarchy, inspectors, asset pipeline) keeps projects shippable and experiments reproducible. Pass composition follows a RenderGraph / RenderStack-style model so resource flow stays visible. The arXiv technical report documents batch-oriented engine integration and optional acceleration for tooling-heavy loops alongside the rendering core.
detailZh: Infernux 是我主要的开源游戏引擎。C++17 / Vulkan 原生层负责帧级工作：PBR、级联阴影、MSAA、着色器反射与后处理。集成编辑器（场景/游戏视图、层级、检视器与资产管线）让项目可交付、实验可复现。通道组合采用 RenderGraph / RenderStack 式模型，使资源流动可检视。arXiv 技术报告在渲染核心之外，还记录面向批量的引擎集成与工具链重负载时的可选加速。
roleZh: 作者 — 渲染器、编辑器、管线与发布

name: Vultorch
desc: GPU-native tensor visualization: CUDA tensors displayed through Vulkan without CPU readback; optional true zero-copy via shared GPU memory.
descZh: GPU 原生张量可视化：通过 Vulkan 直接显示 CUDA 张量、避免 CPU 回读；可选基于共享显存的真零拷贝。
detail: Vultorch targets the graphics–compute boundary: show() keeps data on the GPU with a fast GPU→GPU path into Vulkan; create_tensor() can back tensors with Vulkan shared memory for zero memcpy. The stack pairs a C++ core (Vulkan, CUDA interop, ImGui, optional 3D scene view with MSAA and Blinn–Phong) with a declarative Python API (View → Panel → Canvas) for live training monitors, neural rendering debuggers, and multi-channel depth/normal viewers. It is MIT-licensed with packaged wheels and MkDocs tutorials.
detailZh: Vultorch 面向图形与计算的交界：show() 将数据留在 GPU，经快速 GPU→Vulkan 路径上屏；create_tensor() 可用 Vulkan 共享显存支撑张量，实现零 memcpy。技术栈为 C++ 核心（Vulkan、CUDA 互操作、ImGui、可选带 MSAA 与 Blinn–Phong 的 3D 场景视图）与声明式 Python API（View → Panel → Canvas），适用于训练过程监视、神经渲染调试与多通道深度/法线查看等。MIT 协议，提供打包 wheel 与 MkDocs 文档。
role: Creator — Vulkan/CUDA interop, Python API, docs & packaging
roleZh: 作者 — Vulkan/CUDA 互操作、Python API、文档与打包

name: Ailurus OS
desc: Local-first desktop workbench for VLM/LLM tooling: Electron shell, React UI, pluggable apps with capability manifests.
descZh: 面向 VLM/LLM 工具链的本地优先桌面工作台：Electron 壳、React 界面、带能力清单的可插拔应用。
detail: Ailurus OS (codename Machiavelli) is a local-first “desktop OS” for building and running model-facing tools offline. Electron provides the shell; React + Vite powers the UI; a Flask-based runtime routes agent calls to pluggable apps under apps/, each described by ailurus.json (frontend entry, backend entry, capability schemas). I use it to prototype VLM/LLM workflows—dataset browsers, prompt routers, small annotation utilities—without shipping data to a hosted IDE. Packaging supports .ail bundles for third-party plugins.
detailZh: Ailurus OS（代号 Machiavelli）是面向模型工具、本地优先的“桌面操作系统”式工作台。Electron 提供桌面壳；React + Vite 负责界面；基于 Flask 的运行时将智能体调用路由到 apps/ 下的可插拔应用，每个应用由 ailurus.json 描述（前端入口、后端入口、能力模式）。我将其用于快速搭建 VLM/LLM 相关工具原型——数据浏览、提示路由、小型标注工具等——而无需把数据交给云端 IDE。支持 .ail 包分发第三方插件。
role: Architecture — shell, runtime routing, app manifest design
roleZh: 架构 — 桌面壳、运行时路由与应用清单设计

name: EmbodiChain
desc: DexForce’s GPU-accelerated embodied-AI stack: high-fidelity sim, ray-traced sensors, and scalable training pipelines.
descZh: 跨维端到端 GPU 具身智能栈：高保真仿真、光追传感器与可扩展训练管线。
detail: EmbodiChain unifies GPU simulation, data pipelines, modular learning stacks, and evaluation for embodied agents. Public materials highlight high-fidelity rigid/deformable physics, advanced ray-traced sensors, and batch-oriented training. During my internship I focused on the OptiX 8 real-time ray tracing path—multi-camera parallel rendering using NVIDIA warp—and on HPC-oriented module layout so sensor-heavy rollouts stay bandwidth-aware. The framework targets Sim2Real and large-scale synthetic data rather than offline-only toy scenes.
detailZh: EmbodiChain 将 GPU 仿真、数据管线、模块化学习与评测统一在具身智能场景下。公开资料强调刚体/可变形体的高保真物理、先进光追传感器与面向批训练的设计。实习期间我主要负责 OptiX 8 实时光追路径——基于 NVIDIA warp 的多相机并行渲染——以及偏 HPC 的模块划分，使重传感器 rollout 仍可控带宽。框架面向 Sim2Real 与大规模合成数据，而非仅离线小场景演示。
role: Rendering — OptiX 8 RT, multi-camera pipeline, HPC module layout
roleZh: 渲染 — OptiX 8 光追、多相机并行与 HPC 模块划分
